title: Resolve merge conflicts in test vector generator and schema
description: Resolve all merge conflict markers in test/vectors/generate.py and schema.json. Incorporate new vector functions, update main to generate all JSONs, clean schema, remove dead code, ensure ruff compatible and independent oracles. Verify by running generator.
notes: Commit: ef4b05495. Resolved merge conflicts by removing dead ccp9_rendezvous_vectors, updating main() to generate all JSONs (incl. ccp9, ccp_load_balancing, ccp16, rpl_messages), cleaning schema description to v2-only without merge artifacts, ensuring ruff passes + independent oracles. Verified via generator run (10 JSONs updated). Also resolved related python/rpl conflict.
close_reason: Resolved all merge conflicts in generate.py and schema.json; incorporated schc_fragment, ccp_load_balancing, ccp16, ccp9_rendezvous vectors with independent oracles; updated main() to generate additional JSONs; cleaned schema; generator runs successfully and regenerates vectors. Verified with PYTHONPATH=python/src python3 test/vectors/generate.py
